title: Software Engineering
subtitle: SMKN 3 Palu, Central Sulawesi
bullets: Focused on practical and theoretical aspects of software development including web programming, database management, and UI/UX design.
Gained hands-on experience through real projects, team collaboration, and use of industry-standard tools.

title: TOEIC Certification
subtitle: Test of English for International Communication
bullets: Achieved an outstanding score of 940, indicating strong English language skills in listening and reading.
Demonstrated full working proficiency for professional and academic environments.

title: 4th Place - ClimaGlobe
subtitle: NextGen Learning Challenge (NLC) - National Level
bullets: Achieved 4th Place (Juara Harapan 1) at the national level NLC event themed "Education for Action" hosted by LPMPP Universitas Tadulako.
Awarded for ClimaGlobe, an immersive Android AR application utilizing Unity and C# to educate users on climate trends and environmental awareness using generative AI.

title: Web Developer Intern
subtitle: PT. Wesclic Indonesia Neotech, Bantul, Yogyakarta
bullets: Interned at Wesclic, a digital transformation company, working within the web development team using modern, industry-standard technologies.
Gained hands-on experience across the full software development lifecycle, from requirements analysis and coding through to testing and deployment.
Worked in a professional, collaborative environment guided by principles of quality, innovation, and client success.
